channel.title: architects on Dr. Soumyo Maity
channel.description: Recent content in architects on Dr. Soumyo Maity

item.title: Application security for software architects
item.description: As a software architect, you play a critical role in the security of your organization’s applications. You are responsible for designing and implementing applications that are secure by design. Here are some key things to keep in mind when it comes to application security: Applications are a target: Applications are a valuable target for attackers. They can be used to steal data, disrupt operations, or even launch attacks on other systems.
